tasks.title: Retain completed ABCMB bundled-LINX numerical convergence evidence
tasks.message: Attempt 4 run-20260722T134322Z finished with lease release exit=0: 6/6 cases, 0 failures, V2 frozen narrow numerical-consistency decision accepted. This completes the execution task only.

tasks.title: Execute frozen ABCMB spectra, gradient, toy-Fisher and synthetic audits
tasks.message: ADR-0006 cancelled further generic ABCMB audit work. Retained the completed spectra-only component (1/4): five frozen cases accepted with zero warm-repeat drift; gradient/Fisher/recovery/HMC components were not run and receive no completion credit.

tasks.title: Validate offline heartbeat buffering, checkpointing, replay and lease release
tasks.message: Accepted 8/8 offline heartbeat regression at main 1334f1d: durable outbox replayed 11/11 in order with zero duplicates, final checkpoint present, lease release/reacquire verified; this is execution evidence and does not alter the 21% science gate.

tasks.title: Execute frozen LINX standard-neighborhood gradient diagnostics
tasks.message: ADR-0006 cancelled further generic gradient work. Retained exact completed negative evidence at main 7f0294b: 45/45 acceptance records were structured failures, zero silent non-finite outputs, decision not_accepted; diagnostic only, no UQ science-gate credit.

tasks.title: Register a second AutoDL worker only when free from other projects
Execute the W0-W3 frozen standard-BBN challenge grid
Complete registered direct-solver standard-fiducial runtime slices
tasks.message: Operational milestone complete: four registered standard-fiducial runtime slices passed artifact-integrity validation. This does not complete the scientific WHY-NOT task.

tasks.title: Freeze the July 2026 BBN-rate-UQ and nuisance-SBI frontier review
tasks.message: July 2026 frontier review frozen at main f9bcb90 with primary-source registry and ADR-0007. It makes ETR25 actual-PDF ingestion/native-UQ reproduction mandatory, preserves regression-only baselines, and keeps Track B/Nature gates closed.

tasks.title: Maintain the BBN-UQ competitor and novelty matrix
tasks.message: PR #40 merged at main 0c04fb9. Claim-evidence registry now binds nine C0-C4 candidates to exact scopes, missing evidence, falsifiers and signoffs. All C2/C3/C4 claims are machine-enforced unavailable; A00/A09/A11/A12 remain pending; Track B and Nature-tier gates remain closed.

tasks.title: Freeze neutron-lifetime N0-N3 scenarios and weak double-counting rules
tasks.message: Neutron-lifetime decision frozen; A00 and independent weak-physics signoff remain required for Track B

tasks.title: Freeze the cosmological inference observation registry OBS-v1
tasks.message: Observation decision frozen before Track B production; Track B remains NOT FROZEN pending signoff and LVK likelihood audit

tasks.title: Complete direct-solver necessity and emulator-economics memo for the UQ workload
tasks.message: PR #83 merged: four standard-fiducial runtime slices now feed hash-pinned reference arithmetic with raw timing/failure revalidation. This is not a UQ cost projection; direct-solver sufficiency, emulator necessity and the 672-worker-hour gate remain undetermined. Keep P0-WHY-NOT-01 at 0/1.

tasks.title: Benchmark cold/warm, FP64, batch, CPU, RAM, I/O and failure rates
Audit located solver, rate-table, model and inference assets
tasks.message: SageNet structural validation passed on autodl-westb-01: all four SHA-verified checkpoints loaded with weights_only=True, strict state-dict matching, and finite (1,256,2) CPU output. This is not accuracy validation. Scaler pickles mix sklearn 1.2.2 (CosmicNet2/RNN) and 1.6.1 (LSTM/Transformer), so paper-environment equivalence remains open.

tasks.title: Deploy the project-isolated research-ops control instance
tasks.message: project-isolated control service, auth, ledger, local ops-status branch and health check ready; systemd persistence pending sandbox boundary

tasks.title: Freeze reproducible control, solver, LINX and ABCMB environments
tasks.message: Environment gate complete at main a588392: exact locks, worker CPU/GPU smokes, source-revision checks, and CI evidence are all registered.

tasks.title: Validate ledger, heartbeat, stale detection and snapshots on one worker
tasks.message: PR #57 now buffers raw TimeoutError during offline start; PR #59 stops outbox drain after the first transient failure, preserving queued events while eliminating timeout-per-event lease tails. Main faca688 deployed and heartbeat CLI smoke passed on westb.

tasks.title: Import and audit reusable public solver/model source lineages
tasks.message: Canonical ML4GW/BBNet source snapshot imported at exact commit under MIT; earlier Hdiao112 lineage retained separately. New source audit found train/evaluate schema mismatches, so it is approved only as refactor input.

tasks.title: Reproduce PRIMAT MC, PRyMordial marginalization, LINX q-runs, atlas and GP baselines
tasks.message: Evidence reconciled at main 2a67a9a. Scientific progress is 2/5 only: PRIMAT + PRyMordial accepted; LINX tolerance plateau 0.00124645 > 0.001, atlas Li7/Yp checks failed, and GP lacks code/hyperparameters/draws/data/seed. Offline heartbeats were archived and superseded, not replayed.

tasks.message: Accepted 3/3 narrow UQ0 forward baselines at main ad98345: exact-source LINX, PRyMordial and PRIMAT return Y_p/D/H with runtime, hashes and structured failure ledgers. This does not accept R0 nuisance mappings, production labels, gradients/HMC or cross-solver fidelity.

tasks.title: Freeze coherent numerical priors and solver mappings for the three R0 rates
tasks.message: PR #82 merged: frozen LINX and PRyMordial native R0 mapping/reverse regressions plus a 35-model, 7M-draw correlation stress-sampler audit. This is C0 numerical evidence only: no ETR25 posterior reconstruction, no abundance-level UQ, no accepted scientific prior, no A03/A00/A09 sign-off, and production remains prohibited. Keep progress at 0/3.

tasks.message: 3/3 reactions audited at main c65a474; coherent scientific prior and production adapter remain pending UQ0-R0-RATE-PRIOR.

tasks.message: UQ-only scientific scope and model ladder frozen at main 4321afc; numerical R0 priors, solver mappings and weak contract remain separate downstream tasks.

tasks.title: Register neutron-lifetime and weak-rate nuisance handling without double counting
tasks.message: WEAK-v1 implementation contract is ready for UQ0 adapter construction at main ad98345: one project-owned tau_n draw, solver-native sampling disabled, w_weak_norm fixed, and four double-counting guards. Scientific/A00/independent weak signoff and numerical +/-tau regression remain downstream; production labels remain prohibited.
